title: $check
text: $check Return or set the checked status of a menu item. $check $check = Expression set | reset $check Return Values Value Meaning 1 Menu item is checked. 0 Menu item is not checked. In an error occurs, $procerror contains the exact error. Use Use only in the preDisplay trigger of Menu objects. Description The $check function determines whether a check mark appears next to the current menu item. The value of $check does not affect the menu accelerator for that menu item. Since $check is a Boolean function, when Expression evaluates to a non-zero value, $check becomes 1. Related Links reset Reset the value of the specified ProcScript function to 0. set Set the value of the specified ProcScript function to 1 (TRUE). $disable Disables a menu item in a menu object. $hide Return or set the display status of a menu item. trigger preDisplay System trigger that is executed before a menu or menu item is displayed.
